text: Humpback whale songs can echo for miles, but why do they sing? These haunting melodies are more than just sounds; they’re complex signals shared among males. Like cultural hits, their songs evolve, adapting over time, creating a unique oceanic culture. Researchers have discovered that these songs can even influence mating behaviors and social dynamics. But many questions remain: How do they learn these songs, and what do they really mean? Dive deeper into the mysteries of the ocean and discover more about animal culture. Hit that follow for more fascinating insights!
